intro: Upgrade, automate, and embrace chaos as numbers grow, luck bends, and dice never stop rolling. An idle clicker where goblins roll dice nonstop.
description:
Welcome to Dice Goblins Clicker, an idle clicker game about goblins, dice, and extremely irresponsible use of probability.

Roll Dice
Dice make numbers. Big numbers make goblins happy.

Automate Chaos
Hire more goblins, unlock better dice, and stack absurd upgrades that turn “a little luck” into a full blown statistical crime. As your goblin horde grows, rolls become faster, multipliers get sillier, and the dice keep rolling even when you’re not looking.

Upgrade Everything
Discover chaotic modifiers, strange synergies, and questionable goblin inventions that bend luck, logic, and common sense. Optimize your setup or just stare at the numbers going up, goblins don’t judge.

Break numbers
Whether you play for five minutes or leave it running all day, it's about one thing only Roll dice, get bigger numbers, summon more goblins, break stuff and repeat!


Features
6 different dice types
3 unique goblin types
25 achievements for true perfectionists
Prestige system for endless progression
Up to 12 upgrade modifiers
